title: Everyday Bharat Objects — Level 2
tagline: Culture-rich objects that inspire richer words, stories and connections.
description: Children move beyond naming objects to exploring their cultural meaning, uses and connections with Indian traditions. Story-led activities help them describe, compare and express ideas using stronger vocabulary.
benefits: Expands culturally relevant vocabulary and general awareness
Builds appreciation for Indian traditions, crafts and heritage

comparison.format: Double-sided laminated cards with rounded corners

themesIncluded: Indian traditions, cultural symbols, crafts, music, festivals, rituals, values, heritage, empathy and storytelling.
